faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-IVRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-II position at ICAR-IVRI is scheduled for 30 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-II post at the Indian Council of Agricultural Research - Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR-IVRI) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post-Graduate degree in Life Science (Biotechnology/Microbiology/Bioinformatics/Biochemistry or equivalent) or a Graduate degree in Agriculture Science/Technology (including all Agriculture & allied sciences, Animal Science, Veterinary science).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional-II post is between 21 years and 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional-II post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ICAR-IVRI Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for ICAR-IVRI Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Indian Veterinary Research Institute (IVRI) in Izatnagar, Uttar Pradesh. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Do I need to apply online before attending the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. You do not need to apply online beforehand. You just need to report at the venue on the specified date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.
